{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324093218DEDE3B359EF2D231A309"}"},"total":177},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561452682247127832","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很有意思的一本书，穿越小说看多了都是一个套路，但是这本从人设创新的角度还是很少见的，用年龄地位以及官场的反差作为亮点，有种像是现代画展的画放到近代画展的感觉，因为现代画是以刺激为主题的，这本书也是把人设这种刺激发挥的很好，所以啊我很希望能看到男主爹当御史喷男主这个丞相的这一幕[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760539684,"group_id":"7540386910393338904","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6xzCaFAaHwi51vUqo/uUSMsJqXtOeEYjOM0MpuMUi5G","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/94d4c0acff0648f1b1400989497e2f31~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877083&x-signature=dmvLv6sV2L%2FNFeRWi1LwK5BDyGg%3D","user_id":"2268994480384413","user_name":"艾草瑶瑶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2268994480384413","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7540386910393338904","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举+朝堂+种田+架空+爽文+日常+轻松+倒反天罡+前期偏乐子+中期开始权谋】
此文前期乐子。中期开始之后，就往权谋方向转。
富二代方言带着中文系教授老爹喜提“穿越双人套餐”，本以为能靠老爹满腹经纶躺赢当官二代，谁知老爹竟连个秀才都考不上！
为圆自己的“啃老梦”，十三岁的方言被迫扛起全家KPI：一边逼爹悬梁刺股狂刷八股题库，一边智斗乡霸、忽悠冤大头、倒卖山珍暴富，还得防着爷爷抓他下地种田。
直到某天，他发现自己竟和老爹一同站在了内阁大堂。
方言仰天长叹：“不会写八股文的儿子不是好阁老，但这剧情是不是哪里不对？”
前期主角有些小坏，到了后面开始读书之后就会转变。希望各位看官包含。谢谢了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7345b179ef578ac03d11014a69162e68","author":"疯狂的老实人","author_id":"","book_id":"7540386910393338904","book_name":"这爹科举太废，只好我先成阁老","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7540387057512759832","read_count":"15033","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1245358"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"454","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,搞笑轻松,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/a6308fc7e3d05fc0baea9fe6c5cc1599~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499938&x-signature=X4M%2BDfvix2MXOWSYdHB2QnrzuhI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1621129024510552","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"32"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324093218DEDE3B359EF2D231A309"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,
